sections.paragraph:
an unused root; perhaps i.q. Arab. قمأ to gather together, to collect, (kindred to the roots עָמַם, גָּמַם); whence the pr.n. קְמוּאֵל, יְקַמְיָה, יְקַמְעָם, יָקְמְעָם.

קמה

f. (from the root קוּם), stalk of grain; coll. stalks, grain standing on its stalks, Exo 22:5 Deu 16:9 23:26 . Plur., Jud. 15:5 .
